Clim_X74_X73_Version_K

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 29
Func Name: Climatisation

        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position volet distribution dégi": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position volet mixage droit": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position volet mixage gauche": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position volet pieds-ventil": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pression Fréon": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Régime Moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Température Eau": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Température évaporateur": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Température intérieure": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Toxicité CO": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Toxicité NO": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true

    }

        "bitoffset": 4,

        "bitoffset": 5,

        "bitoffset": 6,

        "bitoffset": 5,
